I recap in English, someone writes 文宣 please

Why the fight on the Hong Kong streets? 👊

Pro-government mobs and thugs are IMMUNE to the police enforcement and the law. The past experience was that thugs attacked peaceful protesters and the protesters refrained from retaliation (some of them even lifted their hands above their head to show they didn’t intend to fight). The result was that the beaten, injured peaceful protesters were ARRESTED, further BEATEN, and PRESSED CHARGES UPON by the police 👨‍🎤🥊 while the attackers, the thugs, were SET FREE and even ESCORTED by the police for safe departure of the crime scene. 👮‍♂️👤

Reluctantly, to fight back on the street and NOT TO contact the police is the ONLY WAY for pro-democracy to protect themselves and the weak around them against the thugs and mobsters in these lawless times, when police’s selective law enforcement is prevalent.💪🏼😢

p.s. protesters are trying to minimizing the harm by only responding when being attacked by and try not to induce permanent injury on the thugs.

(Please spread this among your friends to help them understand what’s going on in Hong Kong 👫)
